{{Quote|A modified version of the standard recon STAP, the Heavy STAP supports laser cannons and powerful missiles. The lightly armored vehicle is typically used to explore dangerous areas or mop up retreating enemy forces. Less agile than the generic STAP, the Heavy STAP has difficulty traveling over some terrain, including rivers.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo">''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]''</ref>}}
The '''STAP-2''', which was also known as the '''Heavy STAP''', was developed for the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Heavystap.jpg|thumb|left|150px]]
It sported larger laser cannons and a missile launcher. Several STAP-2 vehicles were seen to be modified with shield generators. The Heavy STAP was used to scout dangerous enemy territory and to eliminate retreating enemy forces.

Its disadvantages included less agility than the standard [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAP-1]] and difficulty in crossing certain types of terrain, including rivers.

==History==
[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] Heavy STAPs were used during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|The resistance fighters]] Lieutenant [[Gavyn Sykes/Legends|Gavyn Sykes]] and Captain [[Kael (officer)|Kael]] stole two speeders in the [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] and [[Capture of Theed/Legends|escape]] into the countryside and [[Skirmishes in the Naboo countryside|destroyed]] many [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAPs]] that attacking the local [[Farm/Legends|farmfields]]. Sykes later used one in the [[Liberation of Camp Four|liberation]] of [[Camp Four/Legends|Camp Four]].<ref name="Star Wars: Battle for Naboo">''[[Star Wars: Battle for Naboo]]''</ref>

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
A different model of [[Heavy Single Trooper Aerial Platform|Heavy STAP]], more closely resembling the STAP-1, is seen in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' {{1st}}
